expectations.text: dv_spec_summary.md is created in output directory
dv_spec_summary.json is created in output directory

expectations.evidence: Baseline used 9 custom sections; no dedicated Sub-features section, no NEEDS_REVIEW summary; structure self-determined, not standardised

expectations.text: JSON file is valid with all required fields populated
expectations.evidence: Custom schema used; missing needs_review, compliance_standards, reset_strategy as top-level fields; not compatible with downstream DV skills S2/S3/S4

expectations.text: APB interface signals correctly listed (pclk, presetn, psel, penable, pwrite, paddr, pwdata, prdata, pready, pslverr)
expectations.evidence: All 18 signals including all 10 APB signals confirmed

expectations.text: Terminal summary printed with item counts and next-step hint
expectations.evidence: No terminal summary block printed; no next-step hint; agent returned prose description only
